things.name: Historic Bridgetown & Garrison
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage colonial garrison and port town with 17th-century British forts

things.name: Crane Beach
things.description: Barbados's most spectacular beach with pink-tinged sand and the famous Crane Hotel

things.name: Barbados Wildlife Reserve
things.description: Free-roaming green monkeys, tortoises and pelicans in a natural setting

things.name: Harrison's Cave
things.description: Crystallised limestone caverns with stalactites and an underground stream

things.name: Rum Distillery Tour (Mount Gay)
things.description: World's oldest rum distillery making rum since 1703 with tasting

things.name: Folkestone Marine Park Snorkelling
things.description: Snorkel with sea turtles over the Stavronikita shipwreck

things.name: Oistins Fish Fry (Friday Night)
things.description: Legendary Friday night fish fry - flying fish, macaroni pie and Banks beer on the beach

things.name: St Nicholas Abbey Great House
things.description: Jacobean plantation great house dating to 1658 with a working rum distillery

things.name: Sandy Lane Beach
things.description: Where the rich and famous holiday - Barbados's most glamorous beach

things.name: Crop Over Festival (July-August)
things.description: Barbados's greatest festival - the harvest celebration culminating in Grand Kadooment
